heading: Duty to carry certificate on vessel and allow examination
label: 12133 Duty to carry certificate on vessel and allow examination

children.heading: .—Duty To Carry
children.label: a .—Duty To Carry
children.text: The certificate of documentation of a vessel shall be carried on the vessel unless the vessel is exempt by regulation from carrying the certificate.

children.heading: .—Availability
children.label: b .—Availability
children.text: The owner or individual in charge of a vessel required to carry its certificate of documentation shall make the certificate available for examination at the request of an officer enforcing the revenue laws or as otherwise required by law or regulation.

children.heading: .—Criminal Penalty
children.label: c .—Criminal Penalty
children.text: A person willfully violating subsection (b) shall be fined under title 18, imprisoned for not more than one year, or both.
